title: Default "Save as Template" only within a Workspace with an option to make it available across the app
excerpt: When a member Saves a board as template, today that template is made available for everyone in Monday.com. Would like to see this behavior improved to have the Save as Template functionality to save the board as template…

posts.author: skmdc (SK)
posts.cookedHtml: When a member Saves a board as template, today that template is made available for everyone in Monday.com. Would like to see this behavior improved to have the Save as Template functionality to save the board as template only for that specific Workspace by default, with an option to make it available across the Monday.com app/instance.
